This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] navigator.clipboard.read() succeeds in paste event
  assert_implements: window.internals is required undefined
[FAIL] navigator.clipboard.write() succeeds in cut event
  assert_implements: window.internals is required undefined
[FAIL] navigator.clipboard.write() succeeds in copy event
  assert_implements: window.internals is required undefined
Harness: the test ran to completion.
